briefing.headline: Rig up a Ned Rig — steady spawn approach for clear water.
briefing.gameplan:
The Ned Rig is a strong choice for spawn with clear water and stable conditions.

KVD: In clear water, they'll bite the Ned Rig on the fall. Cast out, let it sink on dead slack line — don't tighten up until it hits bottom.

Key adjustment for stable: moderate cadence — match the natural pace of local forage.

primaryApproach.retrieve: KVD: In clear water, they'll bite the Ned Rig on the fall. Cast out, let it sink on dead slack line — don't tighten up until it hits bottom.
primaryApproach.targets: Focus on grass, flat, dock. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: Switch to Ned rig (1/4-oz head, same baits as dropshot) when smallmouth are going down and nipping the dropshot weight instead of the bait
alternateApproach.targets: Focus on grass, flat, dock. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: Yamamoto pro Fukae: Uses 14-lb YGK sinking braid to an 8-lb fluorocarbon leader for spawn-time drop-shot and Ned Rig presentations on a Shimano Expride 170M with 2500-size spinning reel

KVD: On clear water grass lakes, most anglers fish the inside line where fish spawn. But fish also spawn in the deeper scattered grass patches (7ft+) in the middle of big flats. Nobody else fishes it — that's a competitive advantage. A lot of larg...

Johnston: You have to be able to judge the size of bedding fish without catching them to make sure you're going to get the right ones. Spend time gathering waypoints on spawning areas before tournament day.

briefing.depthStrategy: Stable spawn conditions have fish committed to beds in 1-5ft. Focus on hard-bottom areas in protected coves, pockets, and flats. Polarized glasses are essential for sight-fishing.
adjustIf: If conditions suddenly shift (pressure drop, wind change), be ready to speed up your approach — transitional moments produce big bites
If water clarity decreases from wind or rain, upsize and switch to brighter colors
If you get followers without commits, add scent or downsize your hook/weight
